item.title: Simply Susan’s Red Dot Sale - 05/16/2026 5:00pm EDT to 05/29/2026 6:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 70 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA This is the BIGGEST sale we have ever had! It’s been almost 11 years in business & we need a fresh start! So we need to clean out space to clean, paint & refresh our space for the holiday season! PLUS! We have some new things in the works Some perfect additions for the fall & holiday season! We are adding items DAILY!
item.dc:creator: Simply Susan's
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Simply Susan’s Red Dot Sale on May 16, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include tiffin, ohio and Seasonal & Holiday.

item.title: Mobile Mammography - 05/26/2026 12:00am EDT to 05/26/2026 1:00am EDT
item.description: Location : 1344 W Seneca Ave, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA The Mercy Health Mobile Mammography Van provides services for easier access to quality care in a safe, convenient environment. The mobile unit uses the same newest high-quality 3D technology, including patient assisted compression, allowing you to control the amount of pressure once in position for your mammogram, allowing for a more comfortable experience.
item.dc:creator: Mercy Health - Springfield
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Mobile Mammography on May 26, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include 3d technology and comfortable experience.

item.description: Location : 14 N Main St, Attica, OH 44807, USA Story Time is best suited for almost 3 year-olds through Kindergarten, lasts for 45-60 minutes, and includes stories, songs, extension activities & a craft.

item.yodel:media_alt_text: Storytime on May 26, 2026 in Attica, OH. Featured themes include attica, ohio and craft.

item.title: Seneca County Safety Council | May Meeting - 05/26/2026 12:00pm EDT to 05/26/2026 1:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 928 W Market St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join us for the Seneca County Safety Council May meeting on May 26, 2026 at 12:00 PM at the North Central Ohio Educational Service Center. Ed Scheeter will present "Motorcycle Awareness and Road Safety," in recognition of Motorcycle Awareness Month, focusing on shared road safety and driver awareness. If you are bringing a guest, please register them no later than May 19 at http://www.SenecaRegionalChamber.com/guest.
item.dc:creator: Seneca Regional Chamber & Development
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Seneca County Safety Council | May Meeting on May 26, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include road safety and safety council.

item.title: Teen Tuesday - 05/26/2026 3:00pm EDT to 05/26/2026 4:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA “Teen Tuesdays” will be returning to the Tiffin-Seneca Public Library every Tuesday from 3:00 p.m. to 4:30 p.m. in the Frost Kalnow Room beginning Tuesday, September 2. Teens in grades 6 through 12 are invited to a weekly afterschool hangout for games, snacks, crafts and more. For more information, log onto http://www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org/ or call the library at 419-447-3751.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Teen Tuesday on May 26, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include grades 6 through 12 and teen tuesday.

item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA “Teen Tuesdays” will be returning to the Tiffin-Seneca Public Library every Tuesday from 3:00 p.m. to 4:30 p.m. in the Frost Kalnow Room beginning Tuesday, September 2. Teens in grades 6 through 12 are invited to a weekly afterschool hangout for games, snacks, crafts and more. For more information, log onto www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org or call the library at 419-447-3751.

item.yodel:media_alt_text: Teen Tuesday on May 26, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include tiffin, ohio and Kids & Family.

item.title: Trivia Tuesday: Music - 05/26/2026 6:00pm EDT to 05/26/2026 7:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA The Tiffin-Seneca Public Library will host “Trivia Tuesday,” an adult trivia night on Tuesday, May 26 from 6:00 to 8:00 p.m. in the Frost Kalnow Room. Join us for an evening of fun, facts, and friendly competition. Teams will battle it out over six exciting rounds designed to test your knowledge about music. Prizes for the winning team include a custom 3D-printed trophy made right here at the Library. This free program is open to both adults and teens. Space is limited so registration is required by visiting the online calendar at http://www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org/ For more information, please call (419) 447-3751 or log onto http://www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org/
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Trivia Tuesday: Music on May 26, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include music trivia and team competition.

item.title: Preview Pop-Up Lunch at the Kitchen - 05/27/2026 11:00am EDT to 06/01/2026 1:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 89 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Come out to the Community Kitchen next Wednesday for our Pop-Up Preview Lunch. We will be hosting Pop-Up Lunch every Monday and Wednesday at the Kitchen starting June 1st from 11am-1pm. https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/eatlikethelocals?__eep__=6&__cft__[0]=AZZNN7TDfe6xe_pz0R9ZGhWzHZnFWYZ10gALa7M9Gzz694w0bbCuf8-gwsEOUw5Dq35C8RnaW8L_ZZjERDMOF5cyLFWTe1F4HYW0A4aFt0LMnGuk7xuqIlEgBOodJCfE-0YFrdQJ3YCDxPpWJav9F-3L&__tn__=q

item.title: Collaborative Luncheon | May - 05/27/2026 11:30am EDT to 05/27/2026 1:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 248 Miami St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Welcome to the Seneca County Collaborative Luncheon series, where you have a seat at the table for a gathering filled with networking, education, promotion, and impact. On the menu… Date & Time: Wednesday, May 27, 2026 11:30 AM: Doors Open 11:30 AM - 12 PM: Networking 12 PM - 1 PM: Program Location: Tiffin University’s Marion Center Featured Speaker: Elected Officials Topic: Legislative Lunch Registration: $25 for members and non-members Our luncheon series is designed to provide a comprehensive experience that embodies the mission of the Collaborative and allows our organization to best serve you. Reserve your seat today at: https://senecaregionalchamberofcommerceoh.growthzoneapp.com/ap/Events/Register/7EFZ90asNCQCd Experience the Collaborative one bite at a time. See you at the luncheon!
item.dc:creator: Seneca Regional Chamber & Development
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Collaborative Luncheon | May on May 27, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include Business and education.

item.title: Craft Creation—Rock Painting - 05/27/2026 2:00pm EDT to 05/27/2026 3:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 701 E County Rd 6 #6, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Everyone needs a rock—a special rock.  Join Linda Rose as we pick and choose a favorite rock and then paint it to your liking, Registration is required at least 24 hours in advance of the program.
item.dc:creator: Seneca Parks
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Craft Creation—Rock Painting on May 27, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include rock painting and special rock.

item.title: Permanent Jewelry Pop Up - 05/27/2026 5:00pm EDT to 05/27/2026 8:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 138 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join us at Empire for a special Permanent Jewelry Pop-Up with Linked by Savannah. Stop in anytime from 5–8 PM to get linked with a custom-fit piece you can wear every day. Choose your chain, get sized, and have it welded on for a seamless, clasp-free finish. We’re pairing the experience with our regular Wine Wednesday, featuring $5 house pours all evening, making it the perfect midweek outing. No appointments needed—this is a first come, first served pop-up. We recommend arriving early to ensure availability. Grab your friends, sip some wine, and treat yourself to something permanent.
item.dc:creator: The Empire Bistro
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Permanent Jewelry Pop Up on May 27, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include custom-fit piece and Fashion.

item.title: Bible Study in Acts - 05/27/2026 6:00pm EDT to 05/27/2026 7:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 339 Sandusky St, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA Join us at 6pm Wednesday Nights for Bible Study through the book of Acts. Everyone is welcome. Childcare is not provided. Contact us with any questions.
item.dc:creator: Fostoria Church of the Nazarene
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Bible Study in Acts on May 27, 2026 in Fostoria, OH. Featured themes include fellowship and fostoria, ohio.

item.title: Cinema & Slice - 05/28/2026 5:00pm EDT to 05/28/2026 7:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA The Tiffin-Seneca Public Library will host “Cinema & Slice” for teens in grades six through twelve on Thursday, May 28 from 5:00 to 7:00 p.m. in the Frost Kalnow Room. Teens are invited to join the Library for pizza and a suspense-filled interactive movie experience featuring the 2025 sequel based on a video game where animatronics come to life. The title of this PG-13 movie can be found on the Library’s website. For more information, please visit the online calendar at http://www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org/ or call 419-447-3751.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Cinema & Slice on May 28, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include tiffin-seneca public library and Film.

item.title: Family Movie Night - 05/28/2026 5:30pm EDT to 05/28/2026 7:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 14 N Main St, Attica, OH 44807, USA Join us for Family Movie Night! Bring your dinner, favorite blanket or camp chair & get comfy! Folding chair seating and popcorn provided! See what's showing by visiting our website https://www.senecaeastlibrary.org/.../family-movie-night-14.
item.dc:creator: Seneca East Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Family Movie Night on May 28, 2026 in Attica, OH. Featured themes include dinner and family movie night.

item.title: How to Read a Book Like a Professor: Follow-Up Discussion - 05/28/2026 6:00pm EDT to 05/28/2026 7:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA **PLEASE NOTE THE DATE AND LOCATION CHANGE As part of the 2026 Christopher D. English Community Read, Tiffin-Seneca Public Library will host “How to Read a Book Like a Professor: Follow-Up Discussion” on Thursday, May 28 at 6:00 p.m. in the Junior Home Room. Heidelberg Professor Dr. Barry Devine will return to the Library to lead a discussion on The Astral Library. This program explores the novel and reflect on Dr. Devine’s earlier session, discussing how his tips and techniques influenced the reading experience. The Community Read features a series of special programs to honor the book The Astral Library by Kate Quinn. Each year the Community Read encourages people in Seneca County to read the selected title and come together for special events and discussions. As the featured event in the Community Read, Kate Quinn, a New York Times best-selling author, will speak to the community on Tuesday, April 28 at 6:30 p.m. at the Chandelier Community Event Center. The author event is completely free and open to the community and will be followed by a book signing. Copies of The Astral Library will be available for purchase thanks to the Pan Yan Bookstore. Information about additional programs and the 2026 Community Read can be found at http://www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org/community-read.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: How to Read a Book Like a Professor: Follow-Up Discussion on May 28, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include community read and discussion.

item.title: Seneca Proud Book Club - 05/28/2026 6:30pm EDT to 05/28/2026 8:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 137 E Perry St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Book club is open to everyone, even if you haven't finished reading the book yet. Books are available at Pan Yan Bookstore in downtown Tiffin and also through the public library.
item.dc:creator: Seneca Proud
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Seneca Proud Book Club on May 28, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include public library and seneca proud.

item.title: "Birch Trees and Path" Thursday, May 28, 2026 9am-12pm or 6pm-9pm #05282601 or #05282602 - 05/28/2026 9:00pm EDT to 05/29/2026 12:00am EDT
item.description: Location : 130 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Pre-registration and payment is required by Friday, May 22. Paint "Birch Trees and Path" in water mixable oils with Carol Hoffman on Thursday, May 28 from 9am until 12 pm or from 6pm-9pm. Please arrive at least 15 minutes before class time. Carol will guide you through the process of creating this painting whether you are a beginner or more advanced painter. All of the materials including the 11"x14" canvas are included in the price of the class. Minimum class size 3 people, maximum of 8. Please bring a large box to take your painting home in. Cost is $50 for TAG members & $60 for non-members. Call Carol with questions. 419 624 7020, Tiffin Art Guild at 419-443-0478 (tiffinartguild@att.net), or stop in at the Gallery, 130 S Washington St, Tiffin between Noon and 4 pm Wednesday thru Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Art Guild
item.yodel:media_alt_text: "Birch Trees and Path" Thursday, May 28, 2026 9am-12pm or 6pm-9pm #05282601 or #05282602 on May 28, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include water mixable oils and Arts.

item.title: Ohio Rural Business Initiative - 05/29/2026 10:00am EDT to 05/29/2026 12:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 96 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join the U.S. Small Business Administration for the Ohio Rural Business Initiative, an in person event designed to support rural based small businesses across all industries. This session will focus on helping businesses understand available resources, access capital, and connect directly with agencies and partners working to support rural economic growth. Is your rural business ready for the next level? The Ohio Rural Business Initiative brings together the SBA and partner organizations to share tools, funding opportunities, and guidance tailored specifically for rural businesses. Attendees will learn what programs are available, how to navigate funding options step by step, and how different agencies are working together to support business growth in rural communities. This is also a great opportunity to connect with officials, resource providers, and fellow rural business owners who are navigating similar challenges and opportunities.
item.dc:creator: Seneca Regional Chamber & Development
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Ohio Rural Business Initiative on May 29, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include funding opportunities and rural business.

item.title: Veterans, Active Military, and First Responders Resource Fair - 05/29/2026 11:30am EDT to 05/29/2026 3:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 342 Perry St, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA Veterans, Active Military, First Responders, bring your family and come to our resource fair on Friday, May 29, 2026 and receive a meal, participate in our raffle, and walk through the fair among resources and vendors! We are here to help you and want to thank you! We will be at the Fostoria Learning Center. 342 Perry Street Fostoria, Ohio
item.dc:creator: Fostoria Church of the Nazarene
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Veterans, Active Military, and First Responders Resource Fair on May 29, 2026 in Fostoria, OH. Featured themes include first responders and fostoria, ohio.

item.description: Location : 14 N Perry St, New Riegel, OH 44853, USA null
item.dc:creator: New Riegel Cafe
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Corner T Fun on May 29, 2026 in New Riegel, OH. This is a recurring event with themes including fun and new.

item.title: Summer Reading Kick-Off with Whiz Bang Science - 05/29/2026 5:00pm EDT to 05/29/2026 7:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA The Tiffin-Seneca Public Library will kick off the 2026 Summer Reading Program with a kickoff party on Friday, May 29 from 5:00 to 7:00 p.m. at the East Green Amphitheater Celebrate the official start of summer at the Library. Beginning at 5:00, sign up for summer reading, use chalk to decorate the sidewalks, enjoy free refreshments, and watch an interactive science show with Dr. Dave at 6:00 p.m. Dr. Dave has the unique ability to take complex scientific concepts and explain them in a simple and fun manner. He brings his blend of fun and educational science experiments to the library in a show you will never forget. For all ages; registration is not required. The 2026 Summer Reading Program, “Unearth a Story,” runs from June 1 through July 31. For more information, call 419-447-3751 or log on to http://www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org/
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Summer Reading Kick-Off with Whiz Bang Science on May 29, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include dr. dave and interactive science show.

item.title: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library - 05/29/2026 6:00pm EDT to 05/29/2026 7:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA We will kick off the Summer Reading Program with a brand new show. Dr. Dave is developing a show with the theme of dinosaurs. Make sure you come to see this wonderful, exciting new show!
item.dc:creator: Whiz Bang Science Show
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library on May 29, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include library and science show.

item.title: "Quiet Pond" Saturday, May 30, 2026 9am-12pm #05302601 - 05/30/2026 9:00am EDT to 05/30/2026 12:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 130 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Pre-registration and payment is required by Saturday, May 23. Paint "Quiet Pond" in acrylics with Carol Hoffman on Saturday, May 30 from 9am until 12 pm. Please arrive at least 15 minutes before class time. Carol will guide you through the process of creating this painting whether you are a beginner or more advanced painter. All of the materials including the 12"x16" canvas are included in the price of the class. Minimum class size 3 people, maximum of 8. Please bring a large box to take your painting home in. Cost is $50 for TAG members & $60 for non-members. Call Carol with questions. 419 624 7020, Tiffin Art Guild at 419-443-0478 (tiffinartguild@att.net), or stop in at the Gallery, 130 S Washington St, Tiffin between Noon and 4 pm Wednesday thru Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Art Guild
item.yodel:media_alt_text: "Quiet Pond" Saturday, May 30, 2026 9am-12pm #05302601 on May 30, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include Arts and acrylics.

item.title: Celebrate 30 Years—Park Scrabble - 05/30/2026 10:00am EDT to 05/30/2026 11:00am EDT
item.description: Location : 155 Miami St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA To help celebrate 30 years, the Seneca County Park District will host a “park scrabble” game  Hike the trail looking for letters to then place on the giant scrabble board.  How many “park” words can you create? Registration is required at least 24 hours in advance of the program.
item.dc:creator: Seneca Parks
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Celebrate 30 Years—Park Scrabble on May 30, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include park scrabble and Parks & Rec.

item.yodel:media_alt_text: History Comes Alive: Charles Foster on May 30, 2026 in Fostoria, OH. Featured themes include History & Museums and charles foster.

item.title: Autumnwood Care Center 2nd Annual Motorcycle and Car show - 05/30/2026 11:00am EDT to 05/30/2026 1:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 670 OH-18, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Autumnwood Care Center’s 2nd Annual Motorcycle & Car Show Join us for a great afternoon of vehicles, food, and community while supporting a meaningful cause! Saturday, May 30 11:00 AM – 1:00 PM Autumnwood Care Center 607 E State Route 18 Tiffin, Ohio 44883 This event will benefit the Seneca County Honor Bus, helping local veterans travel to Washington, D.C. to visit the memorials built in their honor. Event Highlights: • Motorcycle & Car Show • Cookout • 50/50 Raffle • Gift Basket Raffle All activities are by donation and the event is open to the public. Bring your friends, family, and your favorite ride and help us support our veterans! Questions? Call 419-447-7151
item.dc:creator: Autumnwood Care Center
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Autumnwood Care Center 2nd Annual Motorcycle and Car show on May 30, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include Sports, Adult and Causes.

item.title: Grow With Me Planting Class - Kids Event - 05/30/2026 12:00pm EDT to 05/30/2026 1:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 144 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Grow With Me Event Saturday May 30th, 2026 12:00pm Thanks to our amazing sponsor this event series will be admission free for the kids! Planting Words of Hope – Grow with Me Event Join us for a fun, creative, and meaningful hands‑on activity where kids will plant more than just seeds—they’ll plant hope! During this uplifting event, children will write their positive hopes, dreams, and encouraging words on special plant-able seed paper. Together, we’ll tuck those words into soil, symbolizing how positive thoughts can take root and grow over time. Kids will also decorate their own plant pots with affirmations and kind words about themselves, celebrating self‑confidence, creativity, and self‑love. As the seeds grow into plants, they’ll serve as a reminder that with patience, kindness, and care, great things can grow. This activity blends creativity, mindfulness, and nature in a joyful way that encourages kids to believe in themselves and their hopes for the future. Write it. Plant it. Watch it grow! Come create something beautiful today—and help it grow tomorrow. Ages 9 and up welcome! Follow this link to reserve your spot! https://www.zeffy.com/en-US/ticketing/grow-with-me-kids-event Space is limited so don't wait!
item.dc:creator: JAM's Monthly Markets
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Grow With Me Planting Class - Kids Event on May 30, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include kids event and mindfulness.

item.title: 2026 Volunteer Orientation Seminar - 05/30/2026 1:00pm EDT to 05/30/2026 3:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 253 Southwest St, Bellevue, OH 44811, USA Have you ever wanted to get more active with our museum but just didn’t know where to start? Do you have any friends that have expressed an interest in becoming an active member? On Saturday May 30th, we can help you do just that. An introductory seminar will be held in the Freight House at 1 pm to welcome new members and introduce participants to the tasks required to keep the museum functioning. Topics covered will include: Brief history of the museum Explanation of tasks and projects volunteers are needed for Brief overview of our rules and polices Walk around tour of the buildings and grounds weather permitting Q&A and suggestion period. We’ll try to keep the seminar to less than 3 hours in length, material covered may vary depending on the amount of attendees. We look forward to meeting you! https://madrivermuseum.org/events/ Not a member? Please join our team. https://madrivermuseum.org/membership/ Our insurance provider and bylaws requires all our volunteers to be current members of the Mad River & NKP Railroad Society.
item.dc:creator: Mad River & NKP Railroad
item.yodel:media_alt_text: 2026 Volunteer Orientation Seminar on May 30, 2026 in Bellevue, OH. Featured themes include Causes and History & Museums.

item.title: Tiffin Butterflies - 05/30/2026 1:30pm EDT to 05/30/2026 2:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 194 St Francis Ave, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join us for an introduction to 12-15 colorful butterfly species that are common locally during the summer, followed by a short walk looking for a few of them. Program led by Leonard Weber.
item.dc:creator: Franciscan Earth Literacy Center
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Tiffin Butterflies on May 30, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include butterfly species and education.

item.title: Corner T Fun - 05/30/2026 4:00pm EDT to 05/30/2026 9:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 14 N Perry St, New Riegel, OH 44853, USA null
item.dc:creator: New Riegel Cafe
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Corner T Fun on May 30, 2026 in New Riegel, OH. This is a recurring event with themes including corner and dining.

item.title: 9:30am Sunday School 10:30am Church - 05/31/2026 9:30am EDT to 05/31/2026 10:30am EDT
item.description: Location : 339 Sandusky St, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA 9:30am-10:30am Sunday School Classes for Toddlers, Kids, Youth, and Adults on Sunday mornings that study the Bible and talk about applying it to our lives. 10:30am Worship followed by Sunday Service. 10:50am Online, worship at home and join us on Facebook or YouTube at 10:50am live, or watch later at your convenience.
item.dc:creator: Fostoria Church of the Nazarene
item.yodel:media_alt_text: 9:30am Sunday School 10:30am Church on May 31, 2026 in Fostoria, OH. Featured themes include toddlers and youth.

item.title: Pride-Month Kickoff Picnic - 05/31/2026 12:00pm EDT to 05/31/2026 3:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 491 Coe St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA We've reserved the AMVETS Shelter in Hedges-Boyer Park, across from the YMCA for a Big Gay family-reunion-style picnic We're grilling up burgers, hotdogs, NotDogs, and veggie burgers. We'll bring the napkins, silverware, and plates. Bring a side or dessert to share if you're able. We'll have games and activities for all ages, including a community art project and the opportunity to PIE A BOARD MEMBER... stay tuned for more details.
item.dc:creator: Seneca Proud
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Pride-Month Kickoff Picnic on May 31, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include games and activities and pride month.

item.title: 12a | Make it at Home: Folded Book Vase - 06/01/2026 12:00am EDT to 06/01/2026 11:59pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA null
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: 12a | Make it at Home: Folded Book Vase on Jun 1, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include tiffin-seneca public library and Kids & Family.

item.title: Make it at Home: Folded Book Vase - 06/01/2026 9:30am EDT to 06/01/2026 10:30am EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA The Tiffin-Seneca Public Library’s virtual craft series for adults, “Make It At Home,” will offer free supply kits and an instructional video on how to make a folded book vase beginning Monday, June 1. Patrons can pick up a supply kit at the Information Desk full of almost everything needed to make a craft each month, and will only need to use a few basic supplies from home. An instructional video on how to make the vase will be posted on the Tiffin-Seneca Public Library YouTube channel and Facebook page. Please note that kits will be available on a first-come, first-served basis, and registration is not required. One kit per adult. Must be present to receive your kit. This program is free for adults. If all kits are gone, the instruction video and information sheet can still be found at http://www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org/junemakeitathome.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Make it at Home: Folded Book Vase on Jun 1, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include tiffin, ohio and virtual craft series.

item.title: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase - 06/01/2026 1:00pm EDT to 06/01/2026 2:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 47 Clay St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase All Summer Long MEMORIAL DAY THRU LABOR DAY Location: The City of Tiffin Get ready for a summer full of fun with Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase, brought to you by Simply Shop Local! Spend the summer exploring Tiffin as you search for porch geese at participating local businesses throughout the city. Each stop is a chance to discover new places, support local, and enjoy a unique, interactive experience with friends and family. How It Works: • Visit participating businesses around Tiffin • Find the porch goose at each location • Track your progress along the way (details coming soon!) • Explore, shop, and enjoy the journey all summer long Whether you’re competing to find them all or just enjoying the adventure, the Wild Goose Chase is the perfect way to experience everything Tiffin has to offer. Local Businesses: Want to be part of the fun? Message us or tag a business that should join the chase! https://forms.gle/w9RFF2Hy6xC51W657 Stay Tuned: More details—including how to play, prizes, and participating locations—will be announced soon!
item.dc:creator: Simply Shop Local
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase on Jun 1, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include interactive experience and local businesses.

item.title: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase - 06/01/2026 1:00pm EDT to 06/01/2026 2:00pm EDT

Spend the summer exploring Tiffin as you search for porch geese at participating local businesses throughout the city. Local Businesses: Want to be part of the fun? item.title: Backpackin’ Babies—Turtles - 06/01/2026 4:00pm EDT to 06/01/2026 5:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 155 Miami St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA For ages birth to 18 months.  Babies need the great outdoors as much as older youth and adults do.  They need the exposure to fresh air, new environments and learn more than we think.  Spend some time on the trail as we learn about the turtles found in this area.  Come in a front pack, backpack, stroller or just walk.  Bring a blanket to sit on. Registration is required at least 24 hours in advance of the program.
item.dc:creator: Seneca Parks
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Backpackin’ Babies—Turtles on Jun 1, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include backpackin’ babies and birth to 18 months.

item.title: Class I: Growing Basil - 06/01/2026 6:00pm EDT to 06/01/2026 7:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 89 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Learn how to successfully grow basil from plant to thriving herb garden. Tips for site selection (indoors & outdoors) Soil basics & watering needs Ongoing basil plant maintenance How to keep basil full, healthy & productive
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Community Kitchen
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Class I: Growing Basil on Jun 1, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include indoor gardening and outdoor gardening.

item.title: Laundry Day - 06/02/2026 9:00am EDT to 06/02/2026 3:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 339 Sandusky St, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA Sign up for our free laundry days this month at FNC Hope Community Center. Laundry Days, Tuesday June 2nd & 16th 9am-3pm Each family can wash 1 load per month free, laundry detergent is also provided. You must sign up online for an appointment by clicking the link below, or contact Fostoria Church of the Nazarene or the United Way of Fostoria by phone to help you sign up. The location is 339 Sandusky Street in the FNC Community Center https://www.signupgenius.com/go/10C0548AEAB2FAAFBC25-60083268-laundry
item.dc:creator: Fostoria Church of the Nazarene
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Laundry Day on Jun 2, 2026 in Fostoria, OH. Featured themes include fostoria, ohio and free laundry.

item.title: Family Storytime - 06/02/2026 10:30am EDT to 06/02/2026 11:30am EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA The Youth Services Department at the Tiffin-Seneca Public Library will offer “Family Storytime” on Tuesdays, June 2, 9, 16, 23, and 30 at 10:30 a.m. in the Frost Kalnow Room. “Family Storytime” features stories, songs, rhymes, games, and more for the entire family. All ages are welcome and registration is not required. This program is part of the 2026 Summer Reading Program, “Unearth a Story.” For more information, stop by the Junior Library, call 419-447-3751, or log on to http://www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org/
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Family Storytime on Jun 2, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include summer reading program and tiffin, ohio.
